name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100–$500), installment loans (up to $1,000), and title loans (up to $25,000) with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company operates physical store locations across the United States, including the Jacksonville, FL location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave., and also provides online lending options. With over 200,000 Google reviews and a 4.9-star rating, the company has established a presence serving consumers who need quick access to funds between paychecks or for unexpected expenses.

Advance America offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans ($100–$500) structured as two to four-week short-term loans; Installment Loans ($100–$1,000) with multiple payment options over longer repayment terms; and Title Loans ($2,000–$25,000 online) where a vehicle's title serves as collateral. The Jacksonville store is open Monday–Friday 10 a.m.–6 p.m., Saturday 9 a.m.–4 p.m., and closed Sundays. The company operates in partnership with LoanCenter for title loans and offers Western Union services at store locations. Bilingual customer service (Spanish) is available.

Advance America distinguishes itself through extended store hours, in-person customer service with trained staff, multilingual support, and flexible loan products ranging from micro-loans to larger title-based advances. The company emphasizes accessibility for consumers without traditional banking relationships and provides both online and in-store application pathways. Customer reviews highlight personalized service and staff willingness to explain loan terms.

However, payday and installment loans from this category typically carry high APRs not disclosed on this marketing page. The company does not advertise specific interest rates, fees, or total cost of borrowing, making comparison difficult. Title loans require vehicle collateral and risk repossession. These are short-term emergency products, not long-term solutions, and borrowers should be aware of the full cost structure before committing.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Title loans up to $25,000 for vehicle owners with paid-off cars
Both online and in-store application options for convenience
Extended store hours (open 9–10 a.m., closing 4–6 p.m., including Saturdays)
High customer satisfaction with 4.9-star rating across 200,000+ reviews
Flexible loan terms with installment loans offering multi-payment repayment options
cons: APR and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website; typical payday loans carry triple-digit APRs
Title loans require vehicle collateral and risk vehicle repossession if payments missed
Payday loans are very short-term (2–4 weeks), creating potential debt cycles
Requires multiple forms of documentation including government ID, proof of income, and Social Security Number
No mention of credit-building features, hardship programs, or debt management alternatives
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs ($100–$1,000) between paychecks
Vehicle owners with paid-off cars needing larger emergency loans ($2,000–$25,000)
Borrowers without access to traditional bank loans or credit cards
Spanish-speaking consumers seeking bilingual loan services in their community
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed consumers in immediate need of $100–$1,000 in emergency cash or vehicle owners with paid-off cars needing larger advances. The main caveat is that payday and installment loans carry high undisclosed interest rates typical of the industry, and borrowers should fully understand the total cost and repayment obligations before applying; these are short-term emergency products, not long-term financial solutions.
services: Installment Loans ($100–$1,000 with multiple payment options)
Phone pre-qualification for payday and installment loans
Store locations with extended weekend hours

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
